code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut stopped = false
  while i < n and not stopped
    mut b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
    while (b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13) and i < n
      i = i + 1
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    if i >= n
      stopped = true
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut has_digit = false
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        let cb = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          -1
        end
        if cb >= 48 and cb <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (cb - 48)
          has_digit = true
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
      if has_digit
        let value = num * sign
        if value < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + value
        end
      else
        stopped = true
      end
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
